prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Transformers (dry-type & pad-mount), part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: primary/secondary landed reversed. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC Art. 450, 250.30. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Transformers (dry-type & pad-mount) (commercial project)
